# Joe Graham Photography

> Fine art and commercial photographer based in the Birmingham, Alabama metropolitan area.

Joe Graham is a professional photographer specializing in fine art, commercial, portrait, landscape, nature, and event photography. He is based in central Alabama and serves the greater Birmingham metro including Tuscaloosa, Huntsville, Montgomery, Gadsden, Anniston, Decatur, Hoover, and Gardendale. Travel beyond a two-hour radius from Birmingham is available with paid travel and accommodation.

## Pages

- [Home](https://joegraham.studio/): Profile page with bio, portfolio highlights (Top 8), interests, and contact links.
- [Contact](https://joegraham.studio/contact.html): Contact form, service inquiries, astrology compatibility checker, and David Bowie era quiz.
- [Portfolio](https://joegraham.studio/portfolio.html): Full photography portfolio — nature, landscape, portraits, commercial, documentary.
- [Blog](https://joegraham.studio/blog.html): Writing about photography, process, community, and the creative life.
- [Photo Map](https://joegraham.studio/photomap.html): Geographic map of where photographs were taken.

## Contact

- Email: joe@joegraham.studio
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/josephlgraham
- Website: https://joegraham.studio

## Services

- Fine Art Photography
- Commercial & Brand Photography
- Portrait Photography
- Event Photography
- Album Art & Creative Projects
- Nature & Landscape Photography

## Location

Based in the Birmingham, Alabama metropolitan area. Available throughout central Alabama. Travel beyond two hours available with accommodation.

## Details

- Camera system: Fujifilm
- Approach: Natural light preferred. Fine art sensibility applied to commercial work.
- Selective: Takes on a limited number of projects. Prioritizes interesting work and meaningful collaborations.
